subject: Videl in mid-shot, short dark hair, casual pose; small framed inset portrait visible
suspected_ip: Videl (Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super)
description: A young woman is shown in a mid-shot, facing forward or slightly to the side, with one arm raised. She has short dark hair, cut close around the face — consistent with the DBS-era adult Videl shorter cut rather than the Z-era pigtails. She wears a light-colored top, appearing casual or everyday in style. In the lower portion or a side panel of the card, there is a small framed inset image showing a robed or suited male figure, likely a card-design element. Her expression is confident and direct. No ki aura or energy effects are visible.
foreground: Young woman with short dark hair in light top, one arm raised, confident posture
